hero.heading: Your Car Deserves a Doctor, Not a Dealership
hero.subheading: Honest diagnostics, expert repairs, and the kind of service that earns a 4.9-star rating with 244 reviews. Burbank's most trusted mechanic on W Burbank Blvd.

about.heading: Honest Work, Fair Prices
paragraphs: Burbank Auto Doctor has been keeping Burbank on the road with transparent, trustworthy auto repair. We don't upsell, we don't cut corners, and we always explain what's going on with your car before we touch a wrench.

With a 4.9-star rating across 244 reviews, our reputation speaks for itself. From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, we treat every car like it's our own — and every customer like family.
Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM. Drop off in the morning, pick up after work. We make it easy.

services.title: Diagnostics & Inspection
services.description: State-of-the-art computer diagnostics to pinpoint the issue fast. Complete vehicle inspections with honest assessments.

services.title: Engine & Transmission
services.description: Full engine repair, transmission service, timing belts, head gaskets, and everything under the hood.

services.title: Brakes & Suspension
services.description: Brake pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, suspension repair, shocks, struts, and alignment.

services.title: Maintenance & Tune-Ups
services.description: Oil changes, fluid flushes, spark plugs, filters, belts, and scheduled maintenance to keep your car running.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: These guys are the real deal. Honest, fair, and they actually explain what needs to be done. Never going back to the dealership.

reviews.name: Michelle K.
reviews.text: Best auto shop I've ever been to. They fixed my AC for half what the dealer quoted. Incredible service.

reviews.name: Tony L.
reviews.text: I've been bringing all my cars here for 5 years. Trustworthy mechanics are hard to find and these guys are the best.

reviews.name: Sarah W.
reviews.text: They diagnosed my check engine light in 20 minutes and had it fixed same day. Fair price, no BS.

reviews.name: James C.
reviews.text: Five stars isn't enough. Saved me thousands vs the dealership and the car runs better than ever.
